steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence opens with an introductory phrase ending in a comma: "A government body officially known as the Althing," The blank must complete this as a full independent clause — a subject plus verb that identifies and describes the Althing.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — CE was the year when Iceland's parliament, one of the oldest parliaments in the world, first met.: makes a year the subject of the main clause, which cannot serve as an appositive identification of the Althing. ✗
  • Choice B — the world's oldest parliaments include one which first met in 930 CE, Iceland's.: creates a comma splice. ✗
  • Choice C — the first meeting of one of the oldest parliaments in the world, Iceland's, was in 930 CE.: produces an awkward construction that confuses the relationship between phrases rather than identifying the Althing. ✗
  • Choice D — Iceland's parliament is one of the oldest in the world, first meeting in 930 CE.: supplies a complete independent clause with "Iceland's parliament" as subject and "is" as verb, correctly completing the sentence. ✓
That is the correct answer.
